violations.text: Various food items were observed uncovered in the chest freezer. Food items must be covered to prevent contamination. Food was covered at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood, cookline, walk-in shelves, and walk-in fan guard have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The floors throughout the basement, and dry storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Food items were observed in the chest freezer uncovered. Food items must be covered to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
The Walk in cooler door gaskets was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer and the area around the fryer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023

The outer section of the hood system was observed with an accumulation of of debris. The outer portion on the system must be clean to sight and touch. The hood system is due for service. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
